examples: It is debatable whether or not the shareholders were ever properly compensated.
It is highly debatable whether conditions have improved for low-income families.
Whether it's possible to program a robot with safeguards such as Asimov's laws is debatable.
For another, it is debatable how much - deep down - he really wants Massa to be champion.
All this makes it clear that the punishment is proven and authentic and is not debatable.
